title: 国家广电通委会 NBTC 将把 OTT 平台监管纳入五年发展规划
desc_original: The National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) has reached a consensus that it has the authority to regulate over-the-top (OTT) platforms, and will delete this oversight in its upcoming Broadcasting and Television Master Plan (2026–2030).
summary_cn: 泰国国家广播电视和通信委员会（NBTC）已达成共识，确认其有权监管 OTT（流媒体）平台。该机构计划将相关监管规则正式纳入即将出台的《2026-2030年广播电视总体规划》中。此举意味着 Netflix、YouTube 及其他互联网音视频服务在泰国的运营将面临更严格的合规性监测和法律制约，旨在优化行业管理秩序，填补数字内容领域的监管空白。
title_cn: 国家广电通委会 NBTC 将把 OTT 平台监管纳入五年发展规划

title: 政治学者对新政府施政纲领的可行性提出质疑
desc_original: A political science scholar is questioning the viability of the new government's policy platform, despite acknowledging its broad scope in addressing national challenges.
summary_cn: 一名知名的政治学学者公开对泰国新政府提出的施政纲领的可行性表示质疑。尽管专家承认该纲领在应对国家挑战方面涵盖面广泛，但认为在实际执行层面可能面临资金或行政效率等多重阻碍。这反映了学术界对当前政府雄心勃勃的经济和社会改革计划持谨慎态度，也暗示了未来政策落地过程中可能遇到的社会与议会阻力。
title_cn: 政治学者对新政府施政纲领的可行性提出质疑

title: 劳工部部长丘拉潘 Julapun 向遭袭遇难船员家属承诺提供援助
desc_original: Labour Minister Julapun Amornvivat expressed condolences to the families of three Thai crew members of the MV Mayuree Naree who were confirmed killed in an attack on the vessel in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_cn: 泰国劳工部部长丘拉潘（Julapun Amornvivat）向在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）遇袭的“MV Mayuree Naree”号遣返货轮中遇难的三名泰籍船员家属表示哀悼。部长承诺，劳工部将迅速通过社会保障基金及相关海外劳保机制提供经济补偿金和法律援助。此事再度引发对泰国籍海员在全球冲突敏感地区作业的安全保障关注。
title_cn: 劳工部部长丘拉潘 Julapun 向遭袭遇难船员家属承诺提供援助

title: 泰国国家反贪委 NACC 向最高法院递交 44 名议员冒犯君主法案伦理案证据
desc_original: The National Anti-Corruption Commission (NACC) delivered case files to the Supreme Court in a high-profile ethics case against 44 former Move Forward Party (MFP) MPs who signed a proposal to amend Section 112 of the Criminal Code, the lese majeste law.
summary_cn: 泰国国家反贪委员会（NACC）已正式向最高法院提交卷宗，起诉原前进党（MFP）44名议员。这些议员因曾签署提议修改刑法第112条（冒犯君主法/Lese Majeste）而被控严重违反职业操守。由于宪法法院此前已裁定该党修法意图属于企图颠覆君主立宪政体，若最高法院裁定罪名成立，这44名政坛骨干可能面临终身禁止从政的裁决。
title_cn: 泰国国家反贪委 NACC 向最高法院递交 44 名议员冒犯君主法案伦理案证据

title: 泰国 NBTC 批准无人机监管改革草案，扩大频谱使用范围
desc_original: The National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC) has approved a new set of draft regulations to expand drone spectrum use, upgrade technical standards, and strengthen oversight of drone operations nationwide.
summary_cn: 泰国国家广播电视和通信委员会（NBTC）审议并通过了一项无人机监管改革条例草案。新规拟扩大无人机可使用的无线电频谱范围，提升设备技术标准，并加强对全国范围内无人机飞行活动的动态监控。此举旨在平衡无人机在物流及农业领域的商业化应用需求与空域安全保障，规范化无人机在泰的使用门槛。
title_cn: 泰国 NBTC 批准无人机监管改革草案，扩大频谱使用范围

title: 泰国证监会 SEC 加大力度打击投资诈骗
desc: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has intensified law enforcement actions to reinforce market credibility, as a sharp rise in investment scams, largely driven by social media, emerges as a growing systemic risk.
desc_original: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has intensified law enforcement actions to reinforce market credibility, as a sharp rise in investment scams, largely driven by social media, emerges as a growing systemic risk.
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易委员会（SEC）正加大执法力度，以维护市场公信力。近期受社交媒体驱动，投资诈骗案件激增，已成为系统性风险。SEC 提醒投资者警惕高收益回报陷阱，并计划联合相关部门更严厉地打击非法金融活动，维护金融秩序及民众资产安全。
title_cn: 泰国证监会 SEC 加大力度打击投资诈骗

title: 阿努廷 Anutin 总理回避私营炼油厂起诉质疑
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul declined to directly address concerns over private refiners preparing legal action against the government after it ordered a reduction in diesel refining margins, instead referring reporters to Energy Minister Akanat Promphan for clarification.
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul declined to directly address concerns over private refiners preparing legal action against the government after it ordered a reduction in diesel refining margins, instead referring reporters to Energy Minister Akanat Promphan for clarification.
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）近日对私营炼油厂可能起诉政府一事未予正面回应。此前，政府下令强制降低柴油炼油利润率，引发行业不满。阿努廷建议媒体咨询能源部长阿卡纳（Akanat Promphan）以获取更多细节，目前政府与私营能源企业的博弈在持续升级中。
title_cn: 阿努廷 Anutin 总理回避私营炼油厂起诉质疑

title: 泰国议员严厉质询政府燃料管控计划
desc: The energy crisis and soaring fuel prices -- particularly the issue of refining margins -- dominated parliamentary debate during a joint sitting in parliament on Thursday, as opposition parties challenged the government's policy statement.
desc_original: The energy crisis and soaring fuel prices -- particularly the issue of refining margins -- dominated parliamentary debate during a joint sitting in parliament on Thursday, as opposition parties challenged the government's policy statement.
summary_cn: 在周四的泰国国会联席会议上，能源危机和油价飙升成为辩论焦点。反对党就炼油利润率及政府的能源政策提案发难，质疑现行计划无法有效缓解民众负担。能源成本问题已成为当前泰国政坛最激烈的交锋点，影响着政府的民众支持率。
title_cn: 泰国议员严厉质询政府燃料管控计划

title: 曼谷水门 Pratunam 天桥因地铁橙线施工将封闭10个月
desc: The Pratunam flyover on Phetchaburi Road, Bangkok, will be closed to traffic for about 10 months from late April as tunnelling for the Orange Line enters a critical underground phase, the Mass Rapid Transit Authority of Thailand (MRTA) announced on Thursday.
desc_original: The Pratunam flyover on Phetchaburi Road, Bangkok, will be closed to traffic for about 10 months from late April as tunnelling for the Orange Line enters a critical underground phase, the Mass Rapid Transit Authority of Thailand (MRTA) announced on Thursday.
summary_cn: 泰国大众捷运局（MRTA）宣布，位于曼谷碧武里路（Phetchaburi Road）的水门（Pratunam）跨河天桥将于4月下旬起封闭，为期约10个月。此举是为了配合地铁橙线进入关键的地下隧道施工阶段。由于该处是曼谷核心商业区，预计将引发严重的交通拥堵，建议通行者绕行。
title_cn: 曼谷水门 Pratunam 天桥因地铁橙线施工将封闭10个月

title: 物价飞涨阴云笼罩宋干节预热期
desc: Soaring fuel costs are rippling across Thailand just days before the Songkran festival, pushing up food prices, squeezing small vendors, raising costs for farmers and transport operators, and dampening travel sentiment in key tourism centres.
desc_original: Soaring fuel costs are rippling across Thailand just days before the Songkran festival, pushing up food prices, squeezing small vendors, raising costs for farmers and transport operators, and dampening travel sentiment in key tourism centres.
summary_cn: 宋干节（泼水节）临近，泰国却面临严重的通货膨胀。燃油成本激增导致食品价格上涨、运输费用增加，小贩和农民生存压力巨大。由于生活成本上升，泰国民众及游客在主要旅游目的地的消费意愿受挫，传统佳节的欢庆氛围被物价压力所掩盖。
title_cn: 物价飞涨阴云笼罩宋干节预热期

title: 知名奢侈品网红涉嫌售卖假钻石被捕，受害者超100人
desc: The Consumer Protection Police Division (CPPD) has arrested “Nicha”, a well-known online vendor of luxury goods, for allegedly deceiving customers by selling synthetic diamonds marketed as natural, in a case with reportedly more than 100 victims.
desc_original: The Consumer Protection Police Division (CPPD) has arrested “Nicha”, a well-known online vendor of luxury goods, for allegedly deceiving customers by selling synthetic diamonds marketed as natural, in a case with reportedly more than 100 victims.
title_cn: 知名奢侈品网红“Nicha”涉嫌售卖假钻石被捕，受害者超100人
summary_cn: 泰国消费者保护警务处（CPPD）逮捕了著名奢侈品网络商家“Nicha”。该商家涉嫌将人造合成钻石冒充天然钻石进行销售。根据官方调查，此案受害者已超过100人。目前，案件正在深入审理中，旨在打击在社交平台销售虚假高净值商品的欺诈行为。

title: 警惕假椰子汁！夜功府两家无证洗瓶工厂被查封
desc: The Ombudsman has called for an accelerated crackdown on the production of fake coconut water, following the arrest of operators at two processing facilities in Samut Songkhram province.
desc_original: The Ombudsman has called for an accelerated crackdown on the production of fake coconut water, following the arrest of operators at two processing facilities in Samut Songkhram province.
title_cn: 泰当局发布假椰子汁警示，夜功府 (Samut Songkhram) 违规工厂遭查封
summary_cn: 泰国监察专员呼吁加强对假椰子汁生产的打击。此前，警方及相关部门在夜功府 (Samut Songkhram) 突击检查并逮捕了两处加工设施的经营者。调查发现这些工厂涉嫌违规勾兑及在不卫生环境下操作，由于时值泼水节前夕，当局提醒消费者购买正规品牌，警惕劣质饮品。

title: 泰国政府再查封跨国诈骗团伙82.7亿铢资产
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul on Thursday announced the seizure and freezing of a further 8.27 billion baht in assets linked to a transnational scam network, pushing the total value of confiscated assets in the case to more than 20 billion baht.
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul on Thursday announced the seizure and freezing of a further 8.27 billion baht in assets linked to a transnational scam network, pushing the total value of confiscated assets in the case to more than 20 billion baht.
title_cn: 泰国政府再次查抄跨国诈骗团伙82.7亿铢资产，总涉案金额超200亿
summary_cn: 泰国副总理兼内政部长阿努廷 (Anutin Charnvirakul) 周四宣布，当局已再次扣押并冻结了与一跨国诈骗网络相关的82.7亿泰铢资产。目前该案累计没收资产总额已突破200亿泰铢。此举展示了泰国政府打击跨国洗钱及电信诈骗犯罪的强硬决心。

title: 受柴油价格上涨影响，泰国下调泼水节消费预测
desc: The University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC) has revised down its forecast for this year’s Songkran spending to as low as 120 billion baht, from a previous 129.6 billion baht, citing rising diesel prices.
desc_original: The University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce (UTCC) has revised down its forecast for this year’s Songkran spending to as low as 120 billion baht, from a previous 129.6 billion baht, citing rising diesel prices.
title_cn: 泰国下调泼水节消费预测，柴油调价致民众支出保守
summary_cn: 泰国商会大学（UTCC）将今年泼水节期间的消费预测从先前的1296亿泰铢下调至1200亿泰铢。此次调整主要归因于柴油价格上涨推高了生活成本和交通开支，导致民众对于节日游玩和消费的态度趋于谨慎。这反映出能源成本波动对泰国国内旅游及居民购买力的直接影响。

title: 泰旅游部长重申3万亿铢收入目标，拟推行300铢旅游费
desc: Thailand’s tourism minister has vowed to restore tourism revenue to more than 3 trillion baht, exceeding pre-pandemic levels within the new government’s four-year term, and will proceed with a 300-baht tourism fee, as adopted in many countries.
desc_original: Thailand’s tourism minister has vowed to restore tourism revenue to more than 3 trillion baht, exceeding pre-pandemic levels within the new government’s four-year term, and will proceed with a 300-baht tourism fee, as adopted in many countries.
title_cn: 泰旅游部长誓师3万亿铢营收目标，拟重启300铢入境旅游费
summary_cn: 泰国旅游与体育部部长誓言在新政府四年任期内，将旅游收入恢复并提升至3万亿泰铢以上，超越疫情前水平。此外，部长重申将推行计划中的300泰铢“入境旅游费”，用于旅游保险及景点维护。此举效仿多国先例，旨在实现可持续旅游发展，预计将对后续入境政策产生直接影响。

title: 2026年曼谷宋干节指南：从礼佛祈福到泼水狂欢攻略
desc_original: Songkran in 2026 is best tackled like Bangkok traffic: pick your lane early, commit, and keep a dry change of clothes within reach. The Thai New Year’s water fights still dominate the headlines, but this year’s smartest day trips mix temple-time calm with big-city spectacle, from Rattanakosin’s most photogenic blessings to Samut Prakan’s late-April Mon traditions —...
summary_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节（Songkran）来临，曼谷的庆祝活动建议将寺庙祈福与都市狂欢相结合。游客可前往拉达那哥欣岛（Rattanakosin）体验最美传统祝福仪式，或在4月下旬前往北榄府（Samut Prakan）感受独特的孟族（Mon）传统。专家建议提前规划路线并备好干爽衣物。曼谷市内的水战依然是焦点，但避开高峰进行一日游正成为聪明游客的新选择。
title_cn: 2026年曼谷宋干节指南：从礼佛祈福到泼水狂欢攻略

title: 阿披实抨击政府施政大纲：缺乏核心诚意与清晰度
desc_original: Democrat Party leader Abhisit Vejjajiva on Thursday delivered a scathing critique of Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul’s policy statement, accusing the government of lacking clarity, substance and empathy for the public, while failing to address pressing security and economic challenges.
summary_cn: 民主党领袖阿披实（Abhisit Vejjajiva）周四对总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）领导的政府施政大纲提出了严厉批评。他指责政府在应对紧迫的国家安全和经济挑战时，政策陈述缺乏实质内容、清晰度以及对民众痛点的同理心。阿披实认为，现有的政府方案未能为泰国的核心问题提供明确的解决方案，是一份“无心”的报告。
title_cn: 阿披实抨击政府施政大纲：缺乏核心诚意与清晰度

title: 泰国央行行长：预计政策利率将维持不变，经济预测增长1.3%-1.7%
desc_original: The Bank of Thailand will keep its policy interest rate ​on hold, with ‌economic growth projected at 1.3% to 1.7% this year, governor Vitai Ratanakorn said on Thursday.
summary_cn: 泰国央行（Bank of Thailand）行长维泰（Vitai Ratanakorn）周四表示，泰国将维持现有的政策利率水平。他在演讲中指出，预计今年泰国的经济增长率将保持在1.3%至1.7%的区间内。此举表明在当前全球经济环境下，泰国央行货币政策趋于稳健，优先考虑金融稳定平衡，并关注国内经济缓慢复苏的现状。
title_cn: 泰国央行行长：预计政策利率将维持不变，经济预测增长1.3%-1.7%

title: 泰国电影资讯：本周（4月9日至15日）院线新片速递
desc_original: Five new releases that hit cinemas in Thailand this week.
summary_cn: 本周（4月9日至15日），共有5部新电影在泰国各大院线上映。电影资讯同步更新，涵盖了不同类型的影视作品。由于时值宋干节假期前夕，院线排片丰富，为当地民众和留泰工作者提供了多样的娱乐选择。建议观众通过Major Cineplex或SF Cinema等主流影院官网查看具体排片时间。
title_cn: 泰国电影资讯：本周（4月9日至15日）院线新片速递

title: 泰国万国小姐卡拉信府选手凭Hip-Hop舞蹈走红网络
desc_original: Miss Grand Thailand contestant secures global attention with hip hop dance Legacy A contestant from Kalasin province gained international attention after a viral hip hop dance moves during the Miss Grand Thailand 2026 competition in Bangkok on March 28.
summary_cn: 在曼谷举行的2026年泰国万国小姐（Miss Grand Thailand）选美大赛中，一名来自卡拉信府（Kalasin）的选手凭借一段充满活力的Hip-hop舞蹈在网络上迅速走红，并引起了国际关注。该比赛于3月28日举行，其突破传统选美风格的表演形式被认为展示了当代泰国选美选手的多样性和个性魅力。
title_cn: 泰国万国小姐卡拉信府选手凭Hip-Hop舞蹈走红网络

title: 乌隆府（Udon Thani）山火救援队员皮卡撞上电线杆，致两死四伤
desc_original: Two killed as Udon Thani wildfire crew pickup hits power pole Legacy A pickup truck carrying park officials back from a wildfire operation crashed into a power pole on a sharp bend in Udon Thani yesterday evening, April 8, leaving two men dead and four others injured.
summary_cn: 4月8日傍晚，乌隆府（Udon Thani）发生一起惨烈交通事故。一辆载有公园巡护员执行完山火扑救任务返程的皮卡车，在过急弯时失控撞上电线杆。事故导致两名男子当场身亡，另有四人受重伤。目前相关部门正在调查事故的具体成因，初步判断可能与山路崎岖或疲劳驾驶有关。
title_cn: 乌隆府（Udon Thani）山火救援队员皮卡撞上电线杆，致两死四伤

title: 叻丕府（Ratchaburi）继父虐杀一岁男童，竟试图用电击装置“复活”受害者
desc_original: Thai stepfather kills toddler, tries to revive him with electric shock Legacy A Thai stepfather confessed to fatally abusing a one year old boy and shocking the child with an electric fishing device in an attempt to revive him in Ratchaburi.
summary_cn: 叻丕府（Ratchaburi）发生一起骇人听闻的虐童案。一名泰国籍继父向警方承认，自己在施暴导致年仅一岁的继子死亡后，因心生恐惧，竟试图使用电鱼用的电击设备对孩子进行电击，妄图将其“复活”。该男子已被警方逮捕，将面临蓄意伤害致人死亡等严重刑事指控。
title_cn: 叻丕府（Ratchaburi）继父虐杀一岁男童，竟试图用电击装置“复活”受害者

title: 拥有10万粉丝的假钻卖家落网，巴吞他尼府（Pathum Thani）涉案金额超400万铢
desc_original: The owner of a jewellery sales page with nearly 100,000 followers was arrested today, April 9, for allegedly selling fake diamonds and gems through livestreams... Pathum Thani.
summary_cn: 4月9日，巴吞他尼府（Pathum Thani）警方逮捕了一名拥有近10万粉丝的珠宝社交账号主。该嫌疑人涉嫌利用直播带货，将廉价的人造宝石包装成名贵钻石及宝石出售。目前已有大量受害者报案，累计经济损失超过400万泰铢。此案再次提醒在泰外籍人士网购贵重物品需极度谨慎。
title_cn: 拥有10万粉丝的假钻卖家落网，巴吞他尼府（Pathum Thani）涉案金额超400万铢

title: 金价预测：第三季度有望突破每盎司6000美元
desc_original: Gold prices are expected to reach US$6,000 an ounce in the third quarter of this year... even though short-term volatility is expected amid lingering uncertainties, traders say.
summary_cn: 据泰媒援引交易商观点，金价受全球不确定性因素及避险需求推动，预计在今年第三季度可能冲破每盎司6000美元大关。尽管短期内市场仍会面临波动，但在泰投资者及金店行业对长期走势依然看好。作为避险资产，黄金的剧烈价格变动直接影响泰国本土金饰及实物金交易行情。
title_cn: 金价预测：第三季度有望突破每盎司6000美元

title: 邓丽君逝世31年后，清迈（Chiang Mai）昔日管家首谈去世细节
desc_original: A Thai man, who said he was the butler of Taiwanese singer Teng Li-Chun , recalled the events before her death in Chiang Mai...
summary_cn: 一名曾担任华语巨星邓丽君在清迈（Chiang Mai）居所管家的泰国男子最近打破沉默。他回忆称，当年邓丽君不幸去世前夕，曾因病重急需救治，但其就医过程受到清迈当时交通状况的延误。这段往事再次引发华人社会对这位巨星英年早逝的唏嘘。该新闻反映了清迈与国际巨星的一段历史渊源。
title_cn: 邓丽君逝世31年后，清迈（Chiang Mai）昔日管家首谈去世细节
中国光模块巨头Terahop扩展在泰规模 本地采购超50%
summary_cn: 泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）秘书长纳立（Narit Therdsteerasukdi）庆祝光模块企业Terahop（泰国）在泰运营5周年。该公司作为中国光模块产业链的关键参与者，已在泰国实现高度本土化，零部件本地采购比例超过50%。此举标志着中国高科技制造业在泰深度扎根，不仅提升了泰国电子产业的技术水平，也加强了中泰在数字基础设施供应链方面的合作。
desc_original: 泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）秘书长纳立表示，他参加并庆祝了Terahop（泰国）有限公司在泰运营5周年活动... 该公司为中国企业...

title_cn: 奔驰车主逃漏油费 泰国合艾（Hat Yai）加油站员工被迫垫付销账
summary_cn: 4月6日下午，一名驾驶白色梅赛德斯-奔驰（Mercedes-Benz）轿车的女性在宋卡府（Songkhla）合艾县（Hat Yai）Thung Yai区的一家加油站加油1,000泰铢后，未结账便驾车离开。由于监控拍到的支付过程存在争议，23岁的加油站员工Theerapong被迫用个人薪资承担这笔亏损。目前该事件已引起舆论关注，呼吁车主尽快补缴欠款以减轻基层劳动者负担。
desc_original: Mercedes driver doges petrol bill, station worker forced to cover costs Legacy A woman driving a white Mercedes-Benz allegedly left a petrol station in Thung Yai, Hat Yai, Songkhla, with a 1,000 baht fuel bill unpaid on April 6, leaving the employee to cover the cost himself . The incident occurred at 2.42pm when a woman aged around 30 to 35 arrived in a white Mercedes-Benz and asked to fill benzine 95 worth 2,000 baht. She reportedly later reduced the amount to 1,000 baht as the pump was dispensing slowly. Photo via Khaosod An employee, 23 year old Theerapong, said the woman attempted to pay

title_cn: 泰国地产商Prospect看好电商潜力 驱动仓储物流地产需求
summary_cn: 工业地产开发商Prospect Development预计，随着全球供应商为降低风险将供应链迁往泰国，加之电子商务行业的持续扩张，泰国对预建工厂和仓库空间的需求将进一步攀升。该公司认为，供应链多样化和线上购物习惯的普及将成为泰国工业地产市场增长的核心引擎，吸引更多跨国企业和本地电商物流巨头入驻。
desc_original: Industrial estate developer Prospect Development expects greater diversification among global suppliers relocating to Thailand, alongside continued growth in e-commerce, to drive demand for ready-built factories and warehouse space.

title_cn: 花王（Kao）在泰推出“洗洁（Attack）”新营销活动 主打香氛胶囊新技术
summary_cn: 日化巨头泰国花王工业有限公司（Kao Industrial Thailand）针对旗下洗衣粉品牌“洗洁（Attack）”推出了名为“拍、拉、抱，持久留香”的新营销活动。该活动核心在于展示其“香氛胶囊技术（Fragrance Capsule Technology）”，通过身体活动触发香味释放。品牌旨在吸引追求全天候清新体验的职场家庭及年轻人，巩固其在泰国消费品市场的份额。
desc_original: Kao launches Attack campaign showcasing ‘Fragrance Capsule Technology’ for long-lasting freshness Legacy Kao Industrial (Thailand) Co., Ltd. , a Japanese manufacturer of consumer and chemical products, has launched a new campaign for Attack laundry detergent under the concept “To make clothes more fragrant, this moment calls for Attack: Pat, Pull, and Hug.” The company said the campaign highlights Fragrance Capsule Technology , designed to release fragrance throughout the day through physical movement, targeting modern consumers, including working families and younger people with f

title_cn: 泰国警方突袭芭提雅（Pattaya）夜总会 扣留36名涉嫌聚众吸毒中国籍人员
summary_cn: 4月9日凌晨，泰国警方对春武里府（Chon Buri）邦拉蒙县（Bang Lamung）农普（Nong Prue）地区的一家夜总会进行了突击搜查。在收到关于毒品活动的线报后，警方于凌晨3:30进入位于北芭提雅路三路（Pattaya Third Road）的场馆。行动中共有36名中国籍人员被扣留，涉嫌聚众毒品派对。目前警方正在进行身份核查及尿检，案件进一步调查中。
desc_original: Police detain 36 Chinese nationals in Pattaya nightclub raid Legacy Police in Pattaya raided a nightclub in Nong Prue, Bang Lamung, Chon Buri early today, April 9, arresting 36 Chinese nationals suspected of gathering for drug use . The operation took place at 3.30am after police received a tip-off about alleged drug activity inside a venue on Pattaya Third Road in North Pattaya.

title: 一名以色列籍男子因在普吉岛（Phuket）非法经营代持旅行社被捕
desc: Israeli national arrested for nominee-run travel agency in Phuket Legacy Police arrested an Israeli national in Phuket yesterday, April 8, for operating a travel agency illegally through a Thai nominee . Officers from the Department of Tourism and Tourist Police investigated illegal travel agencies in Phuket and found two companies in breach of the law.
desc_original: Israeli national arrested for nominee-run travel agency in Phuket Legacy Police arrested an Israeli national in Phuket yesterday, April 8, for operating a travel agency illegally through a Thai nominee . Officers from the Department of Tourism and Tourist Police investigated illegal travel agencies in Phuket and found two companies in breach of the law.
summary_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）警方昨日逮捕了一名以色列籍男子。该男子涉嫌通过泰国代持人（Nominee）非法经营旅行社。泰国旅游厅与旅游警察在针对非法旅游业者的专项调查中发现，当地有两家公司违反法律规定。此次行动显示了泰国当局打击“影子代持者”及维护旅游市场秩序的决心，外国人在泰经商需严格遵守股权及执照规定。
title_cn: 一名以色列籍男子因在普吉岛（Phuket）非法经营代持旅行社被捕

title: 宋干节（Songkran）期间泰国各大机场推出停车福利迎出行高峰
desc: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月8日，泰国机场集团（AOT）CEO帕维娜表示，宋干节期间民众返乡与旅游出行增加。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月8日，泰国机场集团（AOT）CEO帕维娜表示，宋干节期间民众返乡与旅游出行增加。
summary_cn: 针对即将到来的宋干节（Songkran）假期出行高峰，泰国机场集团（AOT）宣布将在节日期间，为其管辖的各大机场提供停车优惠福利。CEO帕维娜指出，此举旨在应对激增的返乡及旅游客流。对于在泰华人及游客，这不仅能缓解机场周边交通压力，也为长假自驾往返机场的民众提供了便利和成本优惠。
title_cn: 宋干节（Songkran）期间泰国各大机场推出停车福利迎出行高峰

title: 泰国新政府向国会提交施政纲要，阿努廷（Anutin）阐述未来框架
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月9日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷在国会大厦发表政府施政纲要，阐述内阁未来施政框架。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 4月9日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷在国会大厦发表政府施政纲要，阐述内阁未来施政框架。
summary_cn: 4月9日，泰国总理兼内政部长阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）在国会正式发表政府施政纲要，明确了内阁未来的宏观施政方向。该纲要涵盖经济复苏、社会改革及法治建设等关键领域，标志着新政府正式开启行政流程。其政策走向将直接影响泰国未来的投资环境及营商政策，是各方关注的政治焦点。
title_cn: 泰国新政府向国会提交施政纲要，阿努廷（Anutin）阐述未来框架

title: 泰国顶流Mai Davika以新角色亮相中国剧集《冰湖重生》发布会
desc: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月8日，泰国人气演员Mai Davika飞赴海外，出席中国大型剧集《冰湖重生》发布会。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月8日，泰国人气演员Mai Davika飞赴海外，出席中国大型剧集《冰湖重生》发布会。
summary_cn: 泰国知名影星 Mai Davika 于4月8日受邀参与中国重点剧集《冰湖重生》发布会，标志着其事业版图进一步向中国市场扩张。作为中泰文化娱乐产业交流的代表，Mai的加盟不仅体现了中泰影视合作的加深，也反映出泰国艺人在亚洲特别是中国流行文化圈中日益上升的影响力，对于跨国娱乐投资具有参考价值。
title_cn: 泰国顶流Mai Davika以新角色亮相中国剧集《冰湖重生》发布会

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方突袭KTV会所，36名中国人疑涉吸毒被捕
desc: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月9日凌晨，芭堤雅市警察局局长率队，会同泰国东部二区侦查人员，动用40余名警力，对芭堤雅北部Pattaya Sai 3路一处俱乐部实施了包围搜查。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社 据泰媒报道，4月9日凌晨，芭堤雅市警察局局长率队，会同泰国东部二区侦查人员，动用40余名警力，对芭堤雅北部Pattaya Sai 3路一处俱乐部实施了包围搜查。
summary_cn: 4月9日凌晨，芭提雅（Pattaya）警方联合东部侦查部门出动40名警力，突查了位于Pattaya Sai 3路的一家KTV。行动中共有36名中国公民因涉嫌吸毒及参与违禁聚会被逮捕。泰国警方近期加强了对针对特定国籍人士娱乐场所的清查。此类事件高度敏感，涉及外籍人士在泰法律边界及治安整治重点，相关人员或面临驱逐及更严重法律诉讼。
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）警方突袭KTV会所，36名中国人疑涉吸毒被捕

title: 王毅在北京会见泰国公主诗琳通（Maha Chakri Sirindhorn）
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年4月8日，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在北京会见泰国公主诗琳通。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 2026年4月8日，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在北京会见泰国公主诗琳通。
summary_cn: 2026年4月8日，中共中央政治局委员、外交部长王毅在北京会见了应邀访华的泰国玛哈扎克里·诗琳通（Maha Chakri Sirindhorn）公主。王毅表示，诗琳通公主是中泰友谊的象征，也是中国人民的老朋友，为增进两国人民互信及文化交流做出了卓越贡献。双方就深化中泰命运共同体建设、加强各领域务实合作进行了友好交流，彰显了“中泰一家亲”的特殊情谊。
title_cn: 王毅在北京会见泰国公主诗琳通（Maha Chakri Sirindhorn）
